actual_work_performed: Created one negative-prompt-only anti-drift profile while keeping positive prompt, seed, control image, ControlNet strength, and ControlNet end percent unchanged.
Packaged the profile through New-WorkflowRunPackage.ps1 with static validation passing at zero defects.
Executed one bounded local ComfyUI sample and pulled back generated portrait plus diagnostic control-map outputs.
Performed strict whole-image visual QA against the retained seed 711570106 candidate.
Created a side-by-side comparison artifact and skipped the planned robustness rerun because the retained-seed gate failed.
rejection_reason: The negative-only prompt avoided facial hair but still changed retained identity, gender presentation, and background tone too much to justify robustness testing.
next_action: Do not continue prompt-only anti-drift tweaks for MOD-17 Canny without a new identity/reference conditioning strategy. Consider another named local Plan task if no reference strategy is ready.
